title: Health Canada Tobacco Control Directorate and tobacco and vaping industry meetings - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada Tobacco Control Directorate and tobacco and vaping industry meetings
Find out about meetings between Health Canada's Tobacco Control Directorate and industry representatives to regulate tobacco and vaping products in Canada. To meet openness and transparency requirements, the Directorate maintains a public record of meetings related to regulatory consultations and information on science and technology matters, which also align with guidelines set under the World Health Organization Framework Convention on Tobacco Control (PDF format) .
